ars_mekanica.page.archwood.title: Archwood Sawing
ars_mekanica.page.archwood.text: With Mekanism installed, Ars Nouveau's archwood is handled by the Precision Sawmill just like vanilla wood. Logs, wood and stripped variants saw into archwood planks, and crafted archwood blocks break back down into planks.
ars_mekanica.page.archwood.spotlight: Feed any archwood log into the Precision Sawmill to get archwood planks, plus a chance of sawdust.
